    What are people saying about indian restaurants in San Francisco, CA?

    This is a review for indian restaurants in San Francisco, CA:

    "The food at Keeva is fantastic! The meats in each dish were perfectly cooked - juicy and tender. The naan was light and had a great chew to it, and the fried spinach was somehow not at all greasy or heavy. Everything was full of flavor. Ambience - laid back, family owned place. Very friendly and welcoming. I had a wonderful meal here, can't recommend it enough!"

    See more reviews for this business.
